channel.title: 景報 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: AI军事目标锁定与五角大楼“克劳德之战”

item.title: 加拿大养老基金受私募股权低迷冲击
item.description: Rising interest rates bring prolonged downturn to the buyout industry

item.title: 乌克兰打响金融前线保卫战
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 2026奥斯卡未播画面全揭秘
item.description: Inside the winners room and other insights from behind the scenes.

item.title: 2022以来最糟月份或更差：MLIV三分钟
item.description: Anna Edwards, Lizzy Burden, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: 印度用电量创纪录加剧能源危机
item.description: India expects a surge in peak power demand to a record during the hot season, according to people familiar with the matter, potentially adding to energy woes the country is already facing because of t

item.title: 菲律宾众议院批准总统暂停石油税
item.description: The Philippines’ House of Representatives on Monday approved a bill authorizing the president to suspend or reduce the excise taxes on petroleum products during economic emergencies.

item.title: 埃塞俄比亚呼吁民众节约用油
item.description: Ethiopia is asking its citizens to be frugal in their use of fuel as the nation struggles to secure sufficient supply from the Middle East.

item.title: 斯塔默将推取暖油补贴计划
item.description: Households have faced a sharp rise in the cost of heating oil since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 钢厂日耗130万英镑
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 冲绳美军基地附近日校船倾覆致2死
item.description: Two boats carrying 21 people capsized on Monday off Henoko, a controversial relocation site for a US military base off Japan’s southern island of Okinawa, throwing all into the water and leaving two o

item.title: 美股期货随油价上涨 美元走软
item.description: Stocks edged higher and the dollar slipped as traders focused on any signs the Strait of Hormuz will reopen as well as a slew of central bank meetings this week.

item.title: 英伟达需惊喜唤醒沉睡股价
item.description: Nvidia Corp. executives will likely need to deliver a surprise at the chipmaker’s annual AI conference that begins Monday to spark a rally in the moribund stock.

item.title: 安湃声26亿美元收购GN助听业务
item.description: Amplifon SpA agreed to buy the hearing-aid business of GN Store Nord A/S in a deal valued at 17 billion Danish kroner ($2.6 billion), a price that sent shares of the seller soaring the most on record.

item.title: 鸿海预期AI业务2026年增长
item.description: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. is projecting strong sales growth in 2026 after posting disappointing quarterly earnings, seeking to dispel concerns about demand for the Nvidia Corp.-powered servers th

item.title: 剑桥校长促改革学生贷款制度
item.description: Chris Smith criticises ‘absurd position’ graduates find themselves in and calls for more vocational education

item.title: 散户撤离私募信贷"金矿"
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 企业雇失业青年可获补贴
item.description: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.

item.title: 韩美“自由护盾”军演期间高层视察战备
item.description: SEOUL, March 16 (Yonhap) -- South Korea's top general on Monday visited the Army...

item.title: 美国组织在英推动新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 亚马逊春季科技促销15款真折扣精选
item.description: This sale spans almost an entire week, and it’s full of fake “deals.” We hunted to find truly good prices on gear we’ve tested.

item.title: 伊朗队长放弃庇护申请
item.description: Five of the seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.

item.title: 乌干达反对派领袖称逃亡保命
item.description: Bobi Wine says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."

item.title: 以军称 synagogue袭击者兄弟系真主党指挥官
item.description: US officials previously said the man accused of ramming a truck full of explosives into a synagogue had recently lost family in Lebanon.

item.title: 纸币、河狸与英国反弹潮
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: 探究AI游戏逻辑困境之谜
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 马美贸易协定“无效”声明撤回引混乱
item.description: Malaysia’s government has been forced onto the defensive over its much-touted tariff deal with the United States, after a minister walked back an earlier claim that the agreement had been rendered “nu
